channel.name: Vital Signs Alerts
channel.description: Reads latest PLC vital signs snapshot, evaluates clinical thresholds, and generates priority HL7 ORU^R01 messages with abnormal OBX flags only when values are out of range. Simulates ICU clinical surveillance alerting.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Store alert data in channelMap
Build Alert HL7 ORU^R01 with abnormal flags
Build FHIR Observation with interpretation codes
